title: Schema Source Freshness
description: Configures dbt freshness settings for this source

count.description: A positive integer for the number of periods where a data source is still considered fresh

period.description: The time period used in the freshness calculation

filter.description: Add a where clause to the query run by dbt source freshness in order to limit data scanned
